name: Adult Diapers
description:
Looking for donations of Adult Diapers (Size XL), preferably the pull-up/pants type, for an elderly lady whom we are supporting in the community.

She has mobility difficulties and relies on a walking stick to move around safely. She is also experiencing incontinence, and because she is quite frail, she is often unable to get to the toilet in time, especially when she is outside her home. Pull-up style diapers would help her feel more comfortable, maintain her dignity, and give her greater confidence to attend medical appointments and carry on with her daily activities.

If you have any Adult Diapers (Size XL, pull-up/pants type) to spare, your donation would make a meaningful difference in supporting her daily needs.

If you are able to help or would like more information, please feel free to reach out to Nisah at 9657 3159 via WhatsApp or phone call.

Thank you for your kindness and generosity in supporting our community.

passiton.name: adult diapers
passiton.description: unused 12 pieces available
passiton.location: Pasir Ris, Simei, Tampines

name: Baby Chair
description:
A mother of five is 4-monthhs pregnant and is doing her best to prepare for the arrival of her newborn. As the family has limited resources, purchasing essential baby items has been difficult.

A donated baby chair would provide a safe place for the baby during feeding and daily activities and help ease the family's financial burden as they welcome their newest member.

name: Dining Table and Chairs
description: Client resides with her adult son in a HDB public rental flat and has been unemployed for over five years due to multiple medical conditions. Her husband, previously the family’s sole breadwinner, has been in a nursing home for the past three to four years following a stroke. Her son, who is still studying in ITE, works part‑time to support basic household needs, but the family continues to face significant financial hardship. Client's glass dining table, which she received from donation, was broken by her grandchildren when they came over to visit. As such, Client does not have a place to eat her meals, causing disruptions to meet her basic needs. Hence, Client would appreciate the donation of a pre-loved dining table and chairs to allow her to eat her meals comfortably with her family.

name: Bicycle
description:
Client, 11, cycles to school and tuition almost daily but his bicycle chain recently became loose and has been coming off when he cycles - which is dangerous and delays his travel time to school. His father is currently bedridden and has high care needs, and mother is the main caregiver, so parents are unable to afford to buy him a new one. The rest of his siblings are also school-going. A new bicycle will be of great benefit to him.

Thank you!
